judgment.summary: Rapidly growing revenue but deep operating losses and negative profitability characterize this speculative name.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter missed EPS estimates by a wide margin; next earnings 2026-08-10.
positives: Revenue growth 1952.2% YoY — explosive top-line expansion.
Total cash $3.03B vs $2.99B debt — manageable near-term liquidity.
Current ratio 18.47 and Quick ratio 17.91 — strong short-term solvency.
Analyst growth est, current Q 42.8% — continued strong growth expected.
negatives: Operating margin -1014.0% and Profit margin 0.0% — significant operational losses.
Return on equity -37.8% and Return on assets -6.3% — poor returns on capital.
Free cash flow (TTM) $-1.41B — burning significant cash.
Debt/Equity 112.42 — high leverage relative to equity.

news.paragraph: ASTS has no recent headlines to inform an options trade. The stock's price action will likely be driven by its fundamentals and upcoming earnings report. Traders should consider the significant revenue growth alongside the substantial operating losses and the upcoming earnings date.
